_comment_password: Default password is 'changeme'. Generate a new hash with: python3 -c "import hashlib; print(hashlib.sha256(b'yourpassword').hexdigest())"

scripts.name: HTTP Server
scripts.description: Python built-in HTTP server on port 8080

scripts.name: Counter Loop
scripts.command: bash -c 'i=0; while true; do echo "tick $i at $(date +%T)"; i=$((i+1)); sleep 1; done'
